name: Headless Portrait
descs:
Combat Start: Inflict 2 [Sinking] Potency on all enemies with less than 0 SP. (for Abnormalities, one random part)

For each Envy Affinity Skill used, randomly inflict 1 [Sinking] Potency between all enemies next turn. (for Abnormalities, one random part)

Combat Start: Inflict 3 [Sinking] Potency on all enemies with less than 0 SP. (for Abnormalities, one random part)

For each Envy Affinity Skill used, randomly inflict 2 [Sinking] Potency between all enemies next turn. (for Abnormalities, one random part)

Combat Start: Inflict 4 [Sinking] Potency and +1 [Sinking] Count on all enemies with less than 0 SP. (for Abnormalities, one random part)

For each Envy Affinity Skill used, randomly inflict 3 [Sinking] Potency between all enemies next turn. (for Abnormalities, one random part)
